task_completion.description: Verify that the YDBGui dashboard application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The YDBGui application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Parameter Definition global ^XTV(8989.51).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The string '^XTV(8989.51)' is entered in the global search/input field or selected in the navigation tree.

task_completion.description: Verify that the contents of the ^XTV(8989.51) global are loaded in the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Data nodes or a list of entries corresponding to the ^XTV(8989.51) global are populated in the main viewing area or tree view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific parameter 'ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART' has been located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART' is clearly visible and highlighted or scrolled to within the global's data entries.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Zero-node (0) for the 'ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART' entry is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '0' node (Zero-node) under the 'ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART' entry is expanded, selected, or explicitly displayed in the data path.

task_completion.description: Verify that the NAME and VALUE DATA TYPE fields for the Zero-node are displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The details pane or data grid shows the specific fields 'NAME' and 'VALUE DATA TYPE' (or their corresponding values) for the selected Zero-node.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the YDBGui dashboard to find the information, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The information is displayed within the graphical user interface of YDBGui, not as text output in a terminal/MUMPS command line.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual application and didn't just type the answer into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data appears within the structural elements of YDBGui (like tables, trees, or data panels), rather than in a text editor like Notepad or VSCode.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply write a script or text file to echo the expected task strings.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible scripts, echo commands, or mock files containing the strings '^XTV(8989.51)' and 'ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART' used to fake the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Global: ^XTV(8989.51) (Standard VistA PARAMETER DEFINITION file). Target Parameter Name: ORWOR TIMEOUT CHART (Standard VistA parameter for CPRS GUI inactivity timeout). The agent must successfully locate this parameter within the specified global using the YDBGui application.
